title: Bhageeratha
subTitle: Bullabbai, the president of an island village, wishes to construct a bridge between his village and the mainland. Having waited 20 years for it, he sends his son, Chandu, to investigate the delay.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Panchakshari
subTitle: After being possessed by Goddess Durga, a devotee predicts her own death. However, the truth of her demise is unravelled when the devotee's look-alike arrives in the village.

title: Bhayya
subTitle: When Anbu falls for a beautiful girl who finds herself in trouble, he becomes embroiled in a conflict with a local politician and his henchmen.

title: Ready
subTitle: Chandu, an engineering student, falls in love with Pooja, the girl he mistakenly abducts. However, before he can marry her, he must deal with two warring clans.

title: Athadu
subTitle: A professional killer is hired to fake the assassination of a politician. However, when the politician is killed and he is framed for his murder, he takes on a dead man's identity to escape the law.

title: Sardar
subTitle: Son of a disgraced spy, Inspector Vijay Prakash must race against the clock to stop a mysterious water company from producing and spreading toxic water across the nation.

title: Kanchana 3
subTitle: Raghava leads a peaceful life with his family but has an intense fear of ghosts. During a trip to Coimbatore, he becomes possessed by Kaali, a vengeful spirit with a dark past seeking justice and revenge.

title: Ek Niranjan
subTitle: Kidnapped as a child, Chotu grows up to become a police informer whilst searching for his biological parents. However, his life takes an unexpected turn when he falls in love with Sameera.

title: Orey Bujjiga
subTitle: Bujji and Krishnaveni run away on the same day to avoid getting married, leaving their village to believe that they have eloped. The two soon fall in love, unaware of their mutual circumstances.

title: Nenu Local
subTitle: Babu, a carefree graduate, falls in love with Keerthy, his classmate, and pursues a relationship with her. However, her father doesn't approve of their union and wants her to marry a successful man.

title: Robinhood
subTitle: A fearless vigilante steals from the corrupt to help the poor, becoming a symbol of justice and rebellion in a system ruled by greed, deceit, and power-hungry elites.

title: Bommarillu
subTitle: Siddhu's overprotective father decides to get him married to a rich girl. His life, however, takes an interesting turn when he meets and falls in love with Hasini.

title: Spyder
subTitle: Shiva, an intelligence officer, develops a phone software that helps him track those in need of help. He sets out to save the people of Hyderabad when he realises that a serial killer is on the loose.

title: Forensic

title: Kotha Janta
subTitle: Sirish and Suvarna, two selfish individuals, team up to produce a new show. However, while working together, an emotional bond is formed between them and they fall in love with each other.

title: Sikindar

title: Mechanic Rocky
subTitle: While fighting to retain his father's garage, a mechanic discovers the true, chilling reasons behind the meddling of local gangsters.

title: Kalisundam Raa
subTitle: Raghavaiah agrees to invite his estranged son, Bhaskar's family for his birthday. Raghu, Raghavaiah's grandson, learns the reason behind Raghavaiah and Bhaskar's fallout and decides to reconcile them.

title: F3
subTitle: Venky and Varun, who plan on marrying rich women, fall into the trap of their own making when they realise the brides they are wooing are not wealthy but are, in fact, greedy for money.

title: Das Ka Dhamki
subTitle: A financially struggling waiter's life drastically changes course when he learns of his rich lookalike, the CEO of a pharmaceutical company.
